title: Improve invoice print view (remove paid/pending, show total only) and redesign login screen

requirements.text: Update InvoicePrintView to remove the 'Amount Paid' and 'Pending Amount' fields from the printed invoice. Only the Final Amount (and its amount-in-words line) should appear in the GST summary section of the print layout. Do not change any other structural or content elements of the invoice (line items table, GST breakdown rows for Base Amount, CGST, SGST, Round-off, company header, party details, footer).

quotes: remove amount pending and paid from printing only total amount should be written

acceptanceCriteria: The printed invoice does not display an 'Amount Paid' row or field.
The printed invoice does not display a 'Pending Amount' row or field.
The Final Amount row remains present and clearly visible in the GST summary section.
The amount-in-words line (e.g. 'Rupees X Only') continues to appear below the Final Amount on the printed view.
All other invoice content (header, party name, GST No., invoice number, bill date, line items table, Base Amount, CGST, SGST, Round-off, footer) is unchanged.

requirements.text: Improve the visual design and aesthetics of the printed invoice in InvoicePrintView. Enhance layout polish, typography hierarchy, spacing, and overall professional appearance while strictly preserving the existing red-and-white color theme (red header band, white body, red accent borders on GST summary table, red typography for 'MANISH INFRATECH', MI logo in top-left). No structural column changes are permitted.
acceptanceCriteria: The printed invoice uses improved spacing, font sizing, and typographic hierarchy compared to the current version.
The red header band, white body background, red accent borders, and red 'MANISH INFRATECH' typography are preserved.
The MI logo (red/white square with 'MI' initials) continues to appear in the top-left corner of the header.
The line item table columns (Sr. No., HSN Code, Product Name, Qty, Unit, Rate ₹, Amount ₹) are unchanged.
The GST summary section columns and row labels are unchanged.
The overall invoice looks professional and aesthetically refined when printed or previewed.

requirements.text: Redesign the SimpleLoginScreen component with an improved, professional, and visually appealing aesthetic. The redesign must use the existing brand colors (red and white, optionally with navy accents), display the MI logo and 'MANISH INFRATECH' branding prominently, and present the username and PIN input fields in a clean, well-spaced card layout. The hardcoded credentials (username: MANISHINFRATECH, PIN: 1752), inline error display, localStorage session storage behavior, and all authentication logic must remain completely unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: The login screen displays a visually polished card or panel with the MI logo and 'MANISH INFRATECH' branding at the top.
Username and PIN fields are clearly labeled with readable dark text and proper spacing.
The login button uses brand colors (red or navy background with white text) and has a professional appearance.
An inline error message is shown in red/visible color for invalid credentials.
Successful login with MANISHINFRATECH / 1752 grants access to the app and stores the session in localStorage.
No change to authentication logic, credentials, or session management behavior.

constraints: Do not change any other part of the app beyond InvoicePrintView and SimpleLoginScreen.
Do not modify authentication logic, credentials (MANISHINFRATECH / 1752), or session management.
Do not change the structural column layout of the invoice line items table or the GST summary row labels.
Do not alter the red-and-white color theme of the invoice print view.
Do not change any backend code.
nonGoals: Changing the on-screen form views (AddBillForm, EditBillModal) in any way.
Modifying BillResultsTable, SummaryPage, CompanyReportPage, or PartySummaryPage.
Adding new columns or rows to the invoice print layout.
Changing the navigation header or Layout.tsx.
